micropython.source:
# Imports go at the top
from microbit import *


while True:
    if button_a.is_pressed():
        for i in range(4):  
            display.show(Image('00900:'
                       '09000:'
                       '99999:'
                       '09000:'
                       '00900'))
            sleep(1000)
            display.show(Image('00900:'
                       '00090:'
                       '99999:'
                       '00090:'
                       '00900'))
            sleep(1000)
            display.show(Image('00900:'
                       '09990:'
                       '90909:'
                       '00900:'
                       '00900'))
            sleep(1000)
            display.show(Image('00900:'
                       '00900:'
                       '90909:'
                       '09990:'
                       '00900'))
            sleep(1000)
    display.clear()
